title: Brachiaria secernenda
taxonomy: Brachiaria secernenda is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Panicoideae and tribe Andropogoneae. The genus Brachiaria is part of the tribe and is known to be a group of tropical grasses. Brachiaria secernenda is native to tropical Africa and is also found in other regions. The classification of Brachiaria secernenda provides insight into its evolutionary relationships with other plant species in the Poaceae family.
uses: Brachiaria secernenda has been reported to possess various medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and inflammation.
